LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA BOHORQUEZ'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE AND REQUEST FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND EXPENSES IS GRANTED AS TO THE REQUEST TO CHANGE VENUE AND DENIED AS TO THE REQUEST FOR FEES AND EXPENSES. NOTWITHSTANDING THAT DEFENDANT, A MEMBER OF THE BAR, FAILED TO DOCUMENT THE PARTIES' CONTRACT WHEN IT WAS AGREED TO, THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT THE PARTIES' ORAL CONTRACT WAS ENTERED INTO IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY. PLAINTIFF'S CHOICE OF VENUE IN THIS COUNTY DID NOT LACK SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA CSR # 5153
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-15-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610, FOR PARTIES TO COMPLETE TRANSFER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
TRANSFER RECEIPT RECEIVED FROM LOS ANGELES COUNTY WITH NEW CASE NUMBER BC488052

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2012 Continued To Sep-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue And Request For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Expenses; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA BOHORQUEZ'S Motion For Change Of Venue And Request For Reasonable Attorney's Fees And Expenses is Granted as to the request to change venue and denied as to the request for fees and expenses. Notwithstanding that defendant, a member of the bar, failed to document the parties' contract when it was agreed to, the weight of the evidence shows that the parties' oral contract was entered into in Los Angeles County. Plaintiff's choice of venue in this county did not lack substantial justification. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR # 5153

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Continued To Jun-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
